name: codex-storyboard
description: Start the local storyboard app, create and manage projects, process image and video generation tasks, and return assets to Codex Storyboard.

interface.shortDescription: Open a local storyboard app, create storyboards, and generate image/video assets.
interface.longDescription: Codex Storyboard starts a bundled local storyboard app, then lets Codex create, find, update, and delete complete projects without browser automation. It also reads pending shots, honors project aspect ratios and DESIGN.md, routes assets to Image Generation, HyperFrames, or Remotion, and returns outputs to the correct project and row.
defaultPrompt: Create a complete storyboard project from my video idea and write it into Codex Storyboard.
Find and update my local storyboard project.
Process all pending Codex storyboard generation tasks.
Generate the pending storyboard image assets and return them to the storyboard.
Generate the pending HyperFrames or Remotion shots and return the rendered videos.
